str:translations.str:about_feeds: This is a web feed, also known as an Atom feed. Subscribe by copying the URL from the address bar into your newsreader. Visit About Feeds to learn more and get started. It's free.

feed.title: ~/nbaig-dev - tech-learning
feed.subtitle: I am a backend web developer with 14+ years of experience. In this blog I will be posting my journey with the Rust Programming Language.

entry.title: Building Confidence as a Self-Taught Developer
entry.summary: Empower your journey as a self-taught developer! Explore 15 strategies to build confidence, from setting clear goals to engaging with the developer community. Elevate your coding skills and embrace the learning adventure!

entry.title: How to Deal with the Pressure of Learning New Technologies Quickly
entry.summary: Uncover strategies to conquer the pressure of learning new technologies swiftly. From mindset shifts to efficient techniques, this guide empowers your journey in the fast-paced tech landscape.

entry.title: How to Keep Up with New Technologies Without Getting Overwhelmed
entry.summary: Navigate the ever-changing tech landscape with ease. From focused learning goals to community engagement, this guide empowers you to stay updated on new technologies without feeling overwhelmed.

entry.title: How to Overcome the Fear of Coding in Front of Others
entry.summary: Discover 15 actionable strategies to overcome the fear of coding in front of others. From acknowledging your feelings to building confidence through practice, this guide provides practical tips for every developer. Conquer your coding anxiety and foster a supportive learning environment. Share the journey with others seeking to overcome this common hurdle in the world of programming.
